query_string: ("precision medicine"[tiab] OR "personalized medicine"[tiab] OR "personalised medicine"[tiab] OR pharmacogenom*[tiab] OR pharmacogenetic*[tiab]) AND (implement*[tiab] OR "organizational readiness"[tiab] OR "organisational readiness"[tiab] OR "change management"[tiab] OR "clinical workflow"[tiab] OR "scale up"[tiab] OR rollout[tiab]) AND ("2015/01/01"[Date - Publication] : "3000"[Date - Publication]) AND (english[Language])
